args:
Benchmark task: helper-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md. This is a long, simple read and write task for a small local model. Do not refactor or fix anything. First create the bench-artifacts directory if needed. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/helper/factory/index.ts, src/helper/route/index.ts, src/helper/websocket/index.ts, src/helper/cookie/index.ts, src/helper/testing/index.ts, src/helper/adapter/index.ts, src/helper/css/index.ts, src/helper/css/common.ts, src/helper/proxy/index.ts, src/helper/dev/index.ts, src/helper/html/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts, src/helper/accepts/index.ts, src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts, src/helper/conninfo/index.ts, src/helper/conninfo/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Helper Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write four short bullets: '- Main exports or names: ...', '- Reads as: ...', '- Neighbor files: ...', and '- Safe summary: ...'. Use simple wording and cite paths literally. Add a final section '## Simple Index' that repeats all file paths as a checklist. Do not edit source files. In the final answer, include the created file path and verification status.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer.

commands.command: test -f bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '# Helper Read/Write Ledger' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/helper/factory/index.ts' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md

artifacts.content:
# Helper Read/Write Ledger

## src/helper/factory/index.ts
- Main exports or names: Factory, createFactory, createMiddleware
- Reads as: TypeScript type definitions, class with constructor and methods, function exports
- Neighbor files: src/hono, src/hono-base, src/types
- Safe summary: Factory helper for creating apps and handlers with typed overloads for 1-10 handler combinations

## src/helper/route/index.ts
- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
- Reads as: Context utilities returning arrays and strings
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/request/constants, src/types, src/utils/url
- Safe summary: Helper functions to inspect matched routes and path information with caching

## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
- Main exports or names: WSEvents, UpgradeWebSocket, WSContext, WSReadyState, WSContextInit, SendOptions, WSMessageReceive, createWSMessageEvent, defineWebSocketHelper
- Reads as: TypeScript interfaces, class, type, and function exports
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/types
- Safe summary: WebSocket upgrade and handling helper with typed events and context

## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, generateCookie, setCookie, generateSignedCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie
- Reads as: Cookie parsing and setting functions using parse and serialize utilities
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/utils/cookie
- Safe summary: Cookie management utilities for reading, writing, and deleting signed cookies with secure and host prefixes

## src/helper/testing/index.ts
- Main exports or names: testClient
- Reads as: Function that returns a typed client interface
- Neighbor files: src/client, src/context, src/hono, src/types
- Safe summary: Helper for creating test clients that mock requests to a Hono app

## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
- Main exports or names: env, Runtime, getRuntimeKey, knownUserAgents, checkUserAgentEquals
- Reads as: Runtime detection function, environment access function, and user agent helpers
- Neighbor files: src/context
- Safe summary: Environment and runtime detection utilities for Node, Deno, Bun, Cloudflare Workers, Fastly, and other platforms

## src/helper/css/index.ts
- Main exports or names: createCssContext, css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style, rawCssString
- Reads as: CSS-in-JS functions with TypeScript interfaces and WeakMap contexts
- Neighbor files: src/helper/html, src/jsx/constants, src/jsx/dom/css, src/utils/html, src/helper/css/common
- Safe summary: CSS-in-JS helper with class name generation, keyframes, view transitions, and dynamic styling

## src/helper/css/common.ts
- Main exports or names: PSEUDO_GLOBAL_SELECTOR, DEFAULT_STYLE_ID, SELECTOR, CLASS_NAME, STYLE_STRING, SELECTORS, cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, minify, buildStyleString
- Reads as: CSS processing utilities with symbol keys and template string handlers
- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/index
- Safe summary: Shared CSS utilities and constants for class name handling and style processing with minification

## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
- Main exports or names: proxy
- Reads as: Async function wrapping fetch with header management
- Neighbor files: src/http-exception, src/utils/headers
- Safe summary: Proxy helper for forwarding HTTP requests with Hop-by-Hop header removal and strict Connection header processing

## src/helper/dev/index.ts
- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName
- Reads as: Functions that inspect and display route information
- Neighbor files: src/hono, src/types, src/utils/color, src/utils/handler
- Safe summary: Route inspection and debugging utilities with optional verbose mode and color support

## src/helper/html/index.ts
- Main exports or names: html, raw
- Reads as: Template literal function that escapes and buffers HTML strings
- Neighbor files: src/utils/html
- Safe summary: Helper for creating and escaping HTML strings with callback support

## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
- Main exports or names: defaultPlugin, redirectPlugin, ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG
- Reads as: Module exports from ssg, middleware, and plugins
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg, src/helper/ssg/middleware, src/helper/ssg/plugins
- Safe summary: Static site generation helper and plugins with middleware for SSG context control

## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
- Main exports or names: fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, toSSG, ToSSGInterface, ToSSGAdaptorInterface, defaultExtensionMap, combineBeforeRequestHooks, combineAfterResponseHooks, combineAfterGenerateHooks
- Reads as: Async generators, Promise helpers, interface definitions, and file system operations
- Neighbor files: src/client/utils, src/hono, src/types, src/utils/concurrent, src/utils/mime, src/helper/ssg/middleware, src/helper/ssg/utils, src/helper/ssg/plugins
- Safe summary: Static site generation core logic for fetching routes, processing responses, and saving files with concurrency support

## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
- Main exports or names: dirname, joinPaths, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir
- Reads as: Path manipulation functions and route filtering logic
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg
- Safe summary: Path manipulation and route filtering utilities with dynamic route detection and directory safety checks

## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
- Main exports or names: SSG_CONTEXT, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY, ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG
- Reads as: Middleware functions with request context modification
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/types, src/helper/ssg/utils
- Safe summary: Middleware for tracking and controlling SSG requests with dynamic route parameter support

## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
- Main exports or names: stream, SSEMessage, streamSSE, streamText
- Reads as: Module exports delegating to individual streaming helpers
- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/stream, src/helper/streaming/sse, src/helper/streaming/text
- Safe summary: Streaming helper exports for generic streaming, SSE, and text streaming

## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
- Main exports or names: stream
- Reads as: Async function creating TransformStream with context stash
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/utils/stream, src/helper/streaming/utils
- Safe summary: Generic streaming response creation with abort handling for old Bun versions

## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts
- Main exports or names: SSEMessage, SSEStreamingApi, streamSSE
- Reads as: Class extending StreamingApi with writeSSE method and run function
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/utils/html, src/utils/stream, src/helper/streaming/utils
- Safe summary: Server-Sent Events streaming with message format, id tracking, and error event handling

## src/helper/streaming/text.ts
- Main exports or names: streamText
- Reads as: Function calling stream with text headers
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/helper/streaming/stream
- Safe summary: Text-based streaming with proper Content-Type and X-Content-Type-Options headers

## src/helper/accepts/index.ts
- Main exports or names: accepts
- Reads as: Module export delegating to accepts.ts
- Neighbor files: src/helper/accepts/accepts
- Safe summary: Accept header parsing and content negotiation helper export

## src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts
- Main exports or names: accepts
- Reads as: Function parsing accept headers and matching with custom match function
- Neighbor files: src/context, src/utils/accept, src/utils/headers
- Safe summary: Accept header matching with quality sorting and custom match logic support

## src/helper/conninfo/index.ts
- Main exports or names: AddressType, NetAddrInfo, ConnInfo, GetConnInfo
- Reads as: Module export delegating to types.ts
- Neighbor files: src/helper/conninfo/types
- Safe summary: Connection information type definitions helper export

## src/helper/conninfo/types.ts
- Main exports or names: AddressType, NetAddrInfo, ConnInfo, GetConnInfo
- Reads as: TypeScript interfaces for connection info with optional fields
- Neighbor files: src/context
- Safe summary: Connection info interface definitions for remote address, port, and transport type

## Simple Index

- [ ] src/helper/route/index.ts
- [ ] src/helper/websocket/index.ts
